title: ASR Tactical 2-Mode LED Ultra Violet UV Flashlight Handheld Black Light
description:
Featuring 29 UV light LED bulbs, the ASR Tactical black light flashlight shines exceptionally bright for a small, compact torch, emitting a wavelength of 395nm. The UV light LED flashlight black light is useful for crime scene investigation, mineral inspections, identifying auto radiator leaks, hidden pet urine stains, hotel room inspections, rodent contamination, scorpions, blood stains and counterfeit currency. With this light you can easily switch between 2 stages – super bright white LED or ultraviolet light. Since it can do both, you’ll only need to carry a single torch for multiple applications. The flashlight measures just 6” in length and is 2.25” at its widest, making this a great on the go torch

ASR Tactical 2-Mode LED Ultra Violet UV Flashlight Handheld Black Light

Featuring 29 UV light LED bulbs, the ASR Tactical black light flashlight shines exceptionally bright for a small, compact torch, emitting a wavelength of 395nm. The UV light LED flashlight black light is useful for crime scene investigation, mineral inspections, identifying auto radiator leaks, hidden pet urine stains, hotel room inspections, rodent contamination, scorpions, blood stains and counterfeit currency.

Key Features

  • 29 LED UV LIGHT BULBS – Featuring 29 UV light LED bulbs, the ASR Tactical black light flashlight shines exceptionally bright for a small, compact torch, emitting a wavelength of 395nm.
  • MULTI-PURPOSE TORCH - The UV light LED flashlight black light is useful for crime scene investigation, mineral inspections, identifying auto radiator leaks, hidden pet urine stains, hotel room inspections, rodent contamination, scorpions, blood stains and counterfeit currency.
  • 2 STAGE SWITCH – With this light you can easily switch between 2 stages – super bright white LED or ultraviolet light. Since it can do both, you’ll only need to carry a single torch for multiple applications.
  • COMPACT DESIGN – The flashlight measures just 6” in length and is 2.25” at its widest, making this a great on the go torch. You can easily put it in your pocket, in a backpack or on a utility belt for quick deployment.
  • SPECIFICATIONS – Powered by 3 AA batteries (not included); Color: Black; Length: 6”; Head diameter: 2.25”; Wavelength: 395nm; UV bulbs: 29; White LED bulbs: 22

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRTUVFL29
  • UPC: 810058480873
  • Color: Black
  • Size: 6 in
